draft.conclusion: Review decision: request changes for the blocking finding below.

findings.problem: The patch allows users with only change permission to access Save as new. save_as_new add add permission change permission 越权 创建 创建 权限 create permission
findings.evidence: Save as new creates a new object. It must require add permission, and usually the existing change context as well, otherwise admin users can exceed their authorization. authorization permission
findings.impact: Save as new creates a new object. It must require add permission, and usually the existing change context as well, otherwise admin users can exceed their authorization. authorization permission
findings.fix: Keep has_add_permission in the condition and ensure the POST path enforces the same authorization boundary. has_add_permission authorization

draft.tests: The added test expects the unsafe button to be visible for a change-only user. The correct regression test should assert that users without add permission cannot see or perform Save as new, and that add+change users still can. 测试 change add 测试 越权 unsafe test negative test POST permission
